fill.note: fill is low repo-wide; sparse = below p25, dense = above p75 (relative)

ler.note: a large empty rectangle means usable room exists in the scene

shrink.note: shrink-stressed = mean final_scale at or below the median, OR uniform rescale at floor, OR a majority of objects at the packer floor (all PROXY)

label.basis: p90 (auxiliary, not one of the three required bands)
label.note: label-conflict distribution is degenerate (mostly zero); edge applied with a margin

diagnoses.verdict: engine leaves usable space (lower) while shrinking content toward the floor
evidence: largest empty rect 70% at lower (room edge 0.2081)
shrink proxy: mean final_scale 0.6833, min 0.55, 67% of objects at_h_floor (<=0.56)
shrink proxy: up to 2 horizontal shrink pass(es)
diagnoses.suggestion: objects shrink while the lower stays empty; widen the packed zone (zone_b) or spread objects into the lower empty band so the solver need not shrink

diagnoses.verdict: engine leaves usable space (center) while shrinking content toward the floor

shrink proxy: mean final_scale 0.5153, min 0.5153, 100% of objects at_h_floor (<=0.56)
diagnoses.suggestion: objects shrink while the center stays empty; widen the packed zone (rear_right) or spread objects into the center empty band so the solver need not shrink
